free_text: Integral tests of differential cross sections
for (n,alpha) and (n,2n) reactions on niobium
Nb-93 foils.
The total errors in the cross sections
include errors involved in:
* flux measurement,
* counting statistics,
* decay data,
* detector efficiency etc,
and were determined by summing the individual errors
in quadrature.
Data are taken from Tables 4 and 5 of
Radiochemica  Acta, vol. 51 (1990), p49.
HW
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
5MW swimming pool research
reactor (PARR-I) at PINSTECH, Pakistan
Fission spectrum
From these monitor reactions the fast neutron flux
density, effective at the niobium foil, was determined.
Intrinsic high-purity Germanium detector
used in the measurement of the induced activity of
monitor- as well as niobium-foils.
Possible interference from the Y-89(n,g)Y-99-m process
was < 1%.
5MW swimming pool research
reactor (PARR-I) at Pinstech, Pakistan
Fission spectrum
From these monitor reactions the fast neutron flux
density, effective at the niobium foil, was determined.
Before the activity measurement
the pure beta-minus emitting Y-90-g was radiochemical-
ly separated from the niobium ( chemical yield was
about 85%).
Anticoincidence beta-counter.
5MW swimming pool research
reactor (PARR-I) at Pinstech, Pakistan
Fission spectrum
From these monitor reactions the fast neutron flux
density, effective at the niobium foil, was determined.
Intrinsic high-purity germanium detector
used in the measurement of the induced activity of
monitor- as well as niobium-foils.
Juelich isochronous cyclotron ( Julic)
Fast neutrons were produced by bombarding a 1 cm
thick Be target with 31.0 MeV deuterons. Irradiation
of the foils was done in 0 degree direction
at 4 cm from the Be- convertor.
Intrinsic high-purity germanium detector
used in the measurement of the induced activity of
monitor- as well as niobium-foils.
The neutron spectrum was characterized by multiple
foil activation technique in combination with un-
folding (fig. 2. of ref.).
Possible interference from the Y-89(n,g)Y-99-m process
was < 1%.
No mean energy given by authors. Value for En-dummy
given below is compiler's guess from fig. 2 of ref..

ly separated from the niobium ( chemical yield was
